decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id entity_nyc-dot matches the existing registry record entity_nyc-dot (New York City Department of Transportation, agency). The observation resolves to its own canonical record; no link to a different record is needed.

decisions.rationale: Observation base_record_id entity_mta-nyct matches the existing registry record entity_mta-nyct (MTA New York City Transit, agency). Note: do_not_merge_pairs confirm entity_mta-entity-update-2025 (parent MTA) and entity_mta-nyct (subsidiary) are distinct and should not merge, so the observation's assignment to entity_mta-nyct is correct for the agency-level reference.
